Quality control system

Our QC Process

A four-stage quality gate ensures every unit shipped is safe, reliable, and compliant.

STAGE 01

Incoming Material Inspection

All raw materials and components are inspected against specification upon arrival. Only approved materials enter production.

  • Dimensional verification
  • Material certification review
  • Visual and cosmetic inspection
  • Sample electrical testing

STAGE 02

In-Process Quality Control

Continuous monitoring at every stage of the manufacturing process ensures defects are caught before they propagate.

  • PCB assembly inspection (AOI)
  • Weld and assembly verification
  • Torque and fastener checks
  • In-process electrical tests

STAGE 03

Safety & Performance Testing

Every unit undergoes comprehensive safety and performance tests before leaving the production line.

  • Hi-pot (dielectric strength) test
  • Insulation resistance test
  • Output power and efficiency test
  • Protection function verification

STAGE 04

Final Inspection & Aging Test

Products are run under load for extended periods to identify any early-life failures before shipment.

  • 72-hour aging burn-in test
  • Full functional check
  • Communication protocol test
  • Packaging and labeling review

Certifications & Standards

ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management
CE Marking (European Conformity)
GB/T National Standards
IP54 / IP65 Weatherproofing
TÜV Safety Certification
OCPP 1.6J Compliance
CQC China Quality Certification
180+ Intellectual Property Certificates

EV Fast Charging — a global clean energy technology company dedicated to next-generation electric vehicle charging solutions and smart energy infrastructure.

  • Residential Fast Charging
  • Commercial Charging Network
  • Ultra-Fast DC Charging
  • Smart AC Charging
  • Solar Powered Charging
  • Installation & Support
